name: ui-city-builder-board
description: CityBuilderBoard — isometric city builder: place buildings on a grid, grow population, earn resources. game-shell + canvas-2d with live input wiring (PLACE_BUILDING/SELECT_BUILD_TYPE + selectedUnitId/validMoves) and a build-palette control in the HUD.

schema.name: ui-city-builder-board
schema.description: CityBuilderBoard — isometric city builder: place buildings on a grid, grow population, earn resources. game-shell + canvas-2d with live input wiring (PLACE_BUILDING/SELECT_BUILD_TYPE + selectedUnitId/validMoves) and a build-palette control in the HUD.

emits.description: Emits UI:{selectBuildTypeEvent} with {buildType} when player picks a building from the palette
Emits UI:{placeBuildingEvent} with {x,y} on tile click when player places a building
Emits UI:{gameEndEvent} with {result} when the city reaches its goal or collapses

events.name: Select Build Type
events.description: Emits UI:{selectBuildTypeEvent} with {buildType} when player picks a building from the palette

events.name: Place Building
events.description: Emits UI:{placeBuildingEvent} with {x,y} on tile click when player places a building

events.name: Game End
events.description: Emits UI:{gameEndEvent} with {result} when the city reaches its goal or collapses

goldPerBuilding.label: Gold Per Building
goldPerBuilding.description: Gold income per building per tick

featureSprites.label: Feature Sprites
featureSprites.description: Per-type sprite URL map for building features.

pendingBuildType.label: Pending Build Type
pendingBuildType.description: Initially selected building type from the palette

gridHeight.label: Grid Height
gridHeight.description: Number of rows in the tile grid

tiles.label: Tiles
tiles.description: Direct tile data — takes priority over entity-derived tiles.

buildTypes.label: Build Types
buildTypes.description: Placeable building types shown in the build palette with cost.

citizens.label: Citizens
citizens.description: Roaming citizen units displayed on the isometric canvas.

gridWidth.label: Grid Width
gridWidth.description: Number of columns in the tile grid

gold.label: Starting Gold
gold.description: Gold the player starts each game with

woodPerBuilding.label: Wood Per Building
woodPerBuilding.description: Wood income per building per tick

wood.label: Starting Wood
wood.description: Wood the player starts each game with

features.label: Features
features.description: Initial building placements rendered as canvas-2d features.
